name: PROCEPT BioRobotics Corporation Common Stock
summary: PROCEPT BioRobotics Corporation is a surgical robotics company focused on advancing the field of urology with innovative solutions to improve the lives of men with prostate disease. The company's AquaBeam Robotic System is a minimally invasive surgical platform for treating benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH). The company is headquartered in Redwood Shores, California.
